svg.aria-label: Learn the concept — three-node flow glyph (source dot → F ring → target dot) links to the CocoIndex core-concepts guide that explains Target = F(Source), persistent state, the incremental engine, and lineage
svg.title: Learn the concept
svg.desc: Light-theme GitHub grey pill. On the left, a three-node flow glyph — a filled source dot, an F ring in the middle (the transformation), and a filled target dot — encodes the CocoIndex concept Target = F(Source) at a glance. Label reads 'Learn the concept' with a trailing arrow; opens the core-concepts guide covering sources, targets, flows, the incremental engine, and data lineage.
